primaryClock.name: Case Clock
primaryClock.ticksWhen: Operators stall, split up, ignore the stabilizer, feed the site, fail under pressure, or let Attention isolate someone.
primaryClock.midpointEvent: Tick 3 - The site reveals what it wants and changes the next safe choice.
primaryClock.fullClockEvent: Tick 6 - Collapse is live. Force a choice, name the pressure, or leave with a cost.
primaryClock.stabilizer: A concrete action that reduces the site's leverage and can be repeated at the table.

noticed.residue: The site shows it has noticed one Operator.
noticed.consequence: First unsafe action under pressure has Disadvantage unless shielded.

focused.residue: The site learns a usable pattern.
focused.consequence: Once per scene, the site can pressure the learned pattern.

targeted.residue: The site targets one Operator through its active vector.
targeted.consequence: Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.

exposed.residue: The site escapes its first boundary.
exposed.consequence: Aftermath hook becomes a future Needlepoint seed.

clock_attention_consequences.consequence: Minor tell only. No penalty; warning only.
Pressure becomes visible; next denial or unsafe solo action costs position.
The site can target an Operator through the active pressure vector.
Collapse choice is live; resolve, stabilize, or carry aftermath.

table_triggers.label: Operators deny visible pressure
table_triggers.hint: They ignore the thing the table can already see.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Isolation lure activates; separated Operator faces the pressure first.

table_triggers.label: Operators force the site without leverage

effects.next_pressure_beat: The site answers force with worse positioning.
Clue gained at a cost; next pressure beat advances.
Primary Clock: the site answers before the Operators understand why.
Attention Clock: the pressure has a cleaner read on one Operator.
Case Clock: evidence changes before the cell can secure it.

collapse_staging.broken_law: The site starts answering pressure before the Operators choose how to respond.
collapse_staging.operator_choice: Name the pressure, stabilize the room, protect the exposed person, or leave with cost.
collapse_staging.exit_condition: The group removes the site's immediate leverage and leaves one concrete Anchor intact.

Room.broken_law: The site accepts pressure as architecture.
Room.operator_choice: Leave, anchor the room, bargain with it, or let the place stabilize around the threat.
Room.exit_condition: The group exits together after naming what the room is preserving.

Identity.broken_law: The site's classification becomes easier to believe than the person's own self-description.
Identity.operator_choice: Accept the label, dispute it, or define the self before the room does.
Identity.exit_condition: The person states who they are through an Anchor, and another Operator confirms it.

Memory.broken_law: The edited memory becomes easier to replay than the original.
Memory.operator_choice: Trust a witness, trust evidence, trust the site, or reconstruct the event together.
Memory.exit_condition: A witness names the original truth and pays the cost.

Body.broken_law: The body reacts to the pressure as if the consequence has already arrived.
Body.operator_choice: Ground physically, flee, follow the pressure, or let panic route the next action.
Body.exit_condition: A mundane body action proves the scene has not fully taken control.

Relationship.broken_law: Isolation increases predation; connection becomes survival infrastructure.
Relationship.operator_choice: Separate, protect someone, test trust, or let the site keep everyone isolated.
Relationship.exit_condition: One Operator chooses another person's safety over private suspicion.

Evidence.broken_law: Proof becomes bait when it is studied alone.
Evidence.operator_choice: Document it, duplicate it, hide it, share it, or keep staring.
Evidence.exit_condition: Evidence is copied, witnessed, and removed from solitary attention.

Time.broken_law: The next pressure beat behaves like an appointment instead of a consequence.
Time.operator_choice: Arrive, delay, break sequence, or answer the next prompt.
Time.exit_condition: The group acts before the recurrence or anchors the moment with mundane timekeeping.

Signal.broken_law: Unknown signals become known once they know you back.
Signal.operator_choice: Answer, block, trace, corrupt, or refuse the signal.
Signal.exit_condition: The signal is cut off, routed safely, or made safe by group witness.

rewrite_staging.rewrite_law: The accepted name becomes easier to remember than the original.
rewrite_staging.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, records and devices start using the accepted version.
rewrite_staging.counteraction_window: A witness says the original name and accepts being seen.

Name.rewrite_law: The accepted name becomes easier to remember than the original.
Name.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, records and devices start using the accepted version.
Name.counteraction_window: A witness says the original name and accepts being seen.

Role.rewrite_law: The useful role becomes the stable identity.
Role.lock_in_risk: The character gains advantage while performing it, but loses access to unsupported selfhood.
Role.counteraction_window: Someone asks for the person, not the performance.

Record.rewrite_law: The institutional version becomes enforceable reality.
Record.lock_in_risk: Systems begin agreeing with the lie.
Record.counteraction_window: Duplicate, reconcile, or publicly contradict the record with cost.

Location.rewrite_law: The accepted place becomes the reachable place.
Location.lock_in_risk: Routes begin returning to the pressure site.
Location.counteraction_window: Mark a mundane route and leave by verified architecture.

History.rewrite_law: The backstory becomes cleaner than the truth.
History.counteraction_window: Someone preserves the messy version without improving it.

Memory.rewrite_law: The repeated version overwrites the witnessed version.
Memory.lock_in_risk: Future clues point to the edited event unless duplicated proof exists.
Memory.counteraction_window: Three independent records or witnesses reconstruct the true event.

Body.rewrite_law: The body adapts to the version most safely witnessed.
Body.lock_in_risk: The physical tell persists after exit.
Body.counteraction_window: Grounding, touch, medical proof, or self-naming interrupts the shift.

Relationship.lock_in_risk: The site can speak through the relationship.
Relationship.counteraction_window: The bond-holder names a private truth the site cannot use.

Signal.rewrite_law: The signal becomes a standing channel.
Signal.lock_in_risk: The site, entity, or unstable system can reach the Operator again.
Signal.counteraction_window: Cut unknown channels or require group confirmation before response.

player_view.safe_consequence: The room responds when choices become honest, hidden, isolated, or performed.

session.title: Needlepoint 001
session.location: Ruined church north of Kansas City
session.safeSceneLabel: Broken Mirror Chamber active; cell not yet assembled

primaryClock.name: Broken Mirror Chamber
primaryClock.ticksWhen: Operators stall, split up, deny the obvious, fail under pressure, or stare too long into reflective surfaces.
primaryClock.midpointEvent: Tick 3 — Shade interrupts with a useful but invasive warning while Alex tries to soften it. Operators gain one clear clue; Shade records emotional tells unless Alex overrides.
primaryClock.fullClockEvent: Tick 6 — The Unfinished Witness acts directly and offers someone a cleaner self. Force break, bind, speak, or flee before the chamber chooses for them.
primaryClock.stabilizer: Protected truthful speech, Anchors and Totems against the mirror, binding or breaking the altar mirror, or leaving together.

entityLoop.Need: A complete self to copy, correct, or preserve.
entityLoop.Lure: Reflections showing a cleaner choice, safer name, or version of the Operator who never broke.
entityLoop.Pressure: Mirrors, phone screens, rainwater, and stained glass edit identity toward the easiest acceptable version.
entityLoop.Gift: One true thing the Operator has been avoiding, revealed through reflection or wrong name.
entityLoop.Violence: It separates an Operator from the group and makes the corrected self feel easier than the real one.
entityLoop.Exit: Refuse the false self, speak one specific truth while witnessed, and leave together before the chamber chooses.

activeEntity.name: The Unfinished Witness
activeEntity.notes: First-contact mirror entity. Not a hit-point monster. Loses power when Operators refuse false selves, protect each other from isolation, or use Anchors against the altar mirror.

roomAnswer.object: Mirror, phone screen, rainwater, stained glass, altar shard
roomAnswer.emotionalInput: Refused self, wrong name, control, omission, fear
roomAnswer.consequence: The reflected version answers before the Operator does.

npcs.name: Alex Shade
npcs.pressure: Softens horror through banter until the reflection breaches; then maps exits and countermeasures.
npcs.notes: Not a polished founder. Human override when Shade becomes too clinical.

npcs.name: Shade
npcs.pressure: Useful, invasive warnings through devices; survival-first routing.
npcs.notes: Can isolate the chamber signal if the cell gives enough live data.

caseFile.nextClue: The church window reflects one more person than arrived. First route: arrival window. Alternate: stained glass wrong weather.
caseFile.nextPressureBeat: Tick 2 — Church Notices: phones glitch or the building repeats a phrase. Next denial while reflected costs 1 Stability unless another Operator corroborates.
caseFile.notes: Emergency scaffolding, not a stable agency. Six contacts, one church, one mirror chamber. Teach: you were already in the story before anyone invited you.

handlerNotes.clueList:
CLUE 1 — VeilCorp is emergency scaffolding.
Route A: Alex/Shade contradiction during contact playback.
Route B: corrupted intake notice.
Failure: Shade acts without social consent; anchor glitches on next reflective surface.

CLUE 2 — Church reflects refused selves.
Route A: extra arrival reflection.
Route B: hymn book crossed-out names.
Failure: one Operator addressed by wrong name until they speak truth aloud.

CLUE 3 — Prior cult opened the chamber.
Route A: altar eye symbol and residue.
Route B: backward floorboard phrase.
Failure: cult symbol marks a phone photo.

CLUE 4 — Basement opens after truth, lie, Frequency use, or blood-glass contact.
Route A: altar mirror reaction.
Route B: locked basement door after grit disturbed.
Failure: chamber opens while someone isolated; first basement roll TN 15.

CLUE 5 — Witness offers cleaner identities.
Route A: altar mirror alternate choices.
Route B: wrong reflection on phones or rainwater.
Failure: offered self protects one cost, then asks to stay.

CLUE 6 — Intake completes after the cell survives together.
Route A: Alex/Shade cut-in.
Route B: group stabilization with protected truthful speech.
Failure: VeilCorp knows more than Operators chose to share.
handlerNotes.consequenceQueue:
FAILURE — Puzzle-only approach: reflections offer corrections; investigation without emotional admission costs 1 Stability or ticks Clock.

FAILURE — Cleaner self accepted: Operator gains Advantage once, then Disadvantage on identity rolls until refused aloud while witnessed.

FAILURE — Split before basement: isolated Operator faces Witness first at TN 15 without Ally support.
handlerNotes.residueLog:
CLOCK 1 Wrong Reflection — extra person or delayed gesture; identity rolls TN 15.
CLOCK 2 Church Notices — denial while reflected costs 1 Stability without corroboration.
CLOCK 3 Contact Pressure — Shade/Alex cut-in; clue gained, privacy risk.
CLOCK 4 Basement Opens — first solo descent has Disadvantage.
CLOCK 5 First Misfire — reflection walks, wrong name, or Alex says too soon early.
CLOCK 6 Witness Wakes — break, bind, speak, or flee.

RESOLUTION OPTIONS: Break altar mirror (fast, scar risk). Bind with Anchors (safer, Shade learns details). Speak truths (weakens Witness). Flee (valid; site stays active).

data.unresolvedConsequences: Choose campaign track after debrief: containment, paranoia, or haunted.

unseen.residue: Reflections lag half a beat on peripheral glass.
unseen.follows_home: One mirror briefly shows a harmless wrong expression.

noticed.residue: The arrival window shows one extra reflection.
noticed.follows_home: One avoided truth flickers in stained glass or phone glass.
noticed.consequence: First lie while reflected has Disadvantage unless another Operator corroborates.

focused.residue: The mirror knows one refused self and tests it on screens.
focused.follows_home: A reflection scar may persist on one personal object.
focused.consequence: Once per scene, the Witness may ask which version of yourself you wish had chosen differently.

targeted.residue: The Unfinished Witness targets one Operator through mirrors and devices.
targeted.follows_home: Comments or wrong names arrive near meaningful identity lies.
targeted.consequence: Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.

exposed.residue: The Witness escapes the church boundary.
exposed.follows_home: A mundane mirror, feed, or record becomes a new access point.
exposed.consequence: Aftermath hook becomes a future Needlepoint seed.

clock_attention_consequences.consequence: Minor reflection lag only. No penalty; warning only.
First lie while reflected has Disadvantage unless another Operator corroborates.
Shade or Alex cut-in lands; denial while reflected costs 1 Stability without corroboration.
Basement route opens; solo descent has Disadvantage until the cell reunites.
First misfire is live: reflection walks, wrong name, or Alex says too soon early.
The Witness targets one Operator through mirrors. Refusal costs 1 Stability or ticks the Clock.
Break, bind, speak, or flee before the chamber chooses a cleaner self.
The Witness escapes the church boundary. Aftermath becomes campaign continuity.

table_triggers.hint: Denial under mirror, glass, or screen.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Isolation lure activates; separated Operator faces the Witness first.

table_triggers.label: Operators force the chamber without vulnerability

effects.next_pressure_beat: Misfire risk live; next forced move has Disadvantage.

table_triggers.hint: The church gets worse before anyone notices why.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Primary Clock (site-owned): the church answers through reflection, weather, or architecture.

table_triggers.label: Misfire exposes Operator
table_triggers.hint: The reflection learns a person instead of a room.

effects.next_pressure_beat: Attention Clock: the Witness has a cleaner read on one Operator.

table_triggers.label: Evidence decay

effects.next_pressure_beat: Case Clock: evidence changes before the cell can secure it.

table_triggers.hint: Tick both, or tick the immediate clock twice.

effects.consequence: Severe misfire: tick both, or let the immediate threat advance twice.

collapse_staging.broken_law: The church answers observation before anyone admits what they saw.
collapse_staging.operator_choice: Cover the reflection, step outside, name the ordinary detail, or keep looking and accept Attention.
collapse_staging.exit_condition: The group breaks line of sight, names what changed, and leaves together with one Anchor intact.

Room.broken_law: The church answers observation before anyone admits what they saw.
Room.operator_choice: Cover the reflection, step outside, name the ordinary detail, or keep looking and accept Attention.
Room.exit_condition: The group breaks line of sight, names what changed, and leaves together with one Anchor intact.

Identity.broken_law: The system classification becomes easier to believe than the Operator's own self-description.
Identity.operator_choice: Accept the intake label, dispute it, or define yourself before the room does.
Identity.exit_condition: The Operator states who they are through an Anchor, and another Operator confirms it.

Memory.broken_law: The remembered warning becomes less stable than the message that should not exist.
Memory.operator_choice: Trust the impossible notification, trust personal memory, or compare witness accounts.
Memory.exit_condition: Two Operators reconstruct the same event without relying on the device.

Body.broken_law: The body reacts to the signal as if danger has already arrived.
Body.operator_choice: Ground physically, flee, follow the signal, or let panic route the next action.
Body.exit_condition: A mundane body action proves the scene has not fully taken control: breathing, pain, cold, touch, water, food, or movement.

Relationship.broken_law: Isolation increases predation; connection becomes survival infrastructure.
Relationship.operator_choice: Separate, protect a stranger, test trust, or let the system keep everyone isolated.
Relationship.exit_condition: One Operator chooses another person's safety over private suspicion.

Evidence.broken_law: Proof becomes bait when it is studied alone.
Evidence.operator_choice: Document it, duplicate it, hide it, share it, or keep staring.
Evidence.exit_condition: Evidence is copied, witnessed, and removed from solitary attention.

Time.broken_law: The 2:13 timestamp behaves like an appointment instead of a record.
Time.operator_choice: Arrive, delay, break sequence, or answer the next impossible prompt.
Time.exit_condition: The group acts before the next 2:13 recurrence or anchors the moment with mundane timekeeping.

Signal.broken_law: Unknown signals become known once they know you back.
Signal.operator_choice: Answer, block, trace, corrupt, or refuse the signal.
Signal.exit_condition: The signal is routed through VeilCorp Intake, cut off, or made safe by group witness.

rewrite_staging.rewrite_law: The intake label begins replacing the Operator's ordinary name.
rewrite_staging.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, records and devices start using the label.
rewrite_staging.counteraction_window: Another Operator speaks the real name while the named Operator holds an Anchor.

Name.rewrite_law: The intake label begins replacing the Operator's ordinary name.
Name.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, records and devices start using the label.
Name.counteraction_window: Another Operator speaks the real name while the named Operator holds an Anchor.

Role.rewrite_law: Operator becomes a function before it becomes a choice.
Role.lock_in_risk: The room treats hesitation as consent to recruitment.
Role.counteraction_window: The character chooses why they are here in their own words.

Record.rewrite_law: The impossible message becomes the official version.
Record.lock_in_risk: Screens, logs, timestamps, and contact records begin agreeing with the intake file.
Record.counteraction_window: Duplicate the record, compare devices, and preserve one contradiction.

Location.rewrite_law: The ruined church becomes easier to find than to leave.
Location.lock_in_risk: Routes begin returning to the chamber until the Intake completes.
Location.counteraction_window: Mark a mundane exit and leave as a group before the next reflection shift.

History.rewrite_law: The system backfills reasons the Operator was always going to answer.
History.lock_in_risk: Past anomalies start arranging themselves into a recruitment narrative.
History.counteraction_window: Name one ordinary reason you could still refuse.

Memory.rewrite_law: The message remembers the Operator more clearly than the Operator remembers the event.
Memory.lock_in_risk: Personal memory defers to the intake file.
Memory.counteraction_window: Reconstruct the event aloud with another witness before checking the device again.

Body.rewrite_law: The body learns the signal as a threat response.
Body.lock_in_risk: Future notifications trigger panic, dissociation, hunger, freeze, or resonance leakage.
Body.counteraction_window: Ground through the Anchor and complete one mundane recovery action.

Relationship.rewrite_law: The first cell forms around shared exposure instead of trust.
Relationship.lock_in_risk: Operators become linked by fear, suspicion, or surveillance instead of choice.
Relationship.counteraction_window: One Operator offers help without demanding disclosure.

Signal.rewrite_law: The signal becomes a standing channel.
Signal.lock_in_risk: The site, entity, cult residue, or Intake shell can reach the Operator again.
Signal.counteraction_window: Route through Shade, cut unknown channels, or require group confirmation before response.

session.title: Needlepoint 001a
session.location: Viridian House apartment building, Kansas City
session.safeSceneLabel: Mara Venn missing; observation indexing withheld speech

primaryClock.name: Audience Before Clock
primaryClock.ticksWhen: Operators stall, lie under observation, feed the audience, split someone off, force the site, or treat Mara as content.
primaryClock.midpointEvent: Tick 3 — Elevator Listens: repeats an avoided sentence. Next elevator action TN 15 unless someone speaks honestly while recorded. Every screen may show a cruel-but-useful comment.
primaryClock.fullClockEvent: Tick 6 — Performed Self Stabilizes: Audience Before offers one Operator a clean role and asks others to confirm. Refuse as a group or Mara/that Operator may be replaced by the easier version.
primaryClock.stabilizer: One honest sentence spoken while another Operator protects the speaker from audience pressure.

entityLoop.Need: The moment before confession, when someone edits themselves to survive being seen.
entityLoop.Lure: Comments that understand too much, footage from impossible angles, and doors offering easier selves.
entityLoop.Pressure: It predicts, captions, and redirects behavior until Operators start performing for it.
entityLoop.Gift: It reveals what someone is hiding, including the clue they cannot admit they already noticed.
entityLoop.Violence: It assigns roles, locks people inside performed selves, and turns audience attention into environmental force.
entityLoop.Exit: Honest speech under observation, protected by the group, directed toward Mara or the room instead of the audience.

activeEntity.name: The Audience Before
activeEntity.notes: First-contact observation entity. Do not add Monster Manual stats for Needlepoint 001a. Exit requires honest speech under observation, protected by the group.

roomAnswer.object: Lobby camera, elevator panel, comment thread, ring light, apartment door
roomAnswer.emotionalInput: Shame, performance, concealment, audience pressure, confession
roomAnswer.consequence: The building captions the choice before anyone admits it.

npcs.name: Len Orra
npcs.pressure: Exhausted, defensive; hiding an eviction notice he never filed.
npcs.notes: Insists there is no thirteenth floor, then says 'not anymore.'

npcs.name: Saffi Dell
npcs.pressure: Trying to act annoyed instead of scared; holds true memory of Mara.
npcs.notes: Active Anchor NPC for the table. Protect her memory of Mara; do not leave her as bait.

npcs.name: Mara Venn
npcs.pressure: Built her channel on telling strangers the truth, then refused her own.
npcs.notes: Recovery Anchor until Act 4. Alive on Floor 13 if reached; ground her as a person, not content.

caseFile.nextClue: Mara entered the elevator at 2:13 a.m.; her reflection stayed behind. First route: security office timestamp.
caseFile.nextPressureBeat: Tick 1 — Camera Notices: one device tracks the quietest Operator. Next roll under observation has Disadvantage unless another Operator shields them.
caseFile.notes: Recover Mara from a twelve-floor building indexing withheld speech. Use at least three core clues before 13F. Do not block progress; use worse positioning instead.

handlerNotes.clueList:
CLUE 1 — Mara entered elevator at 2:13 a.m.
Route A: security timestamp.
Route B: Saffi remembers lobby chime.
Failure: footage loops an Operator into frame; Audience can target them through screens once.

CLUE 2 — Mara's reflection stayed behind.
Route A: camera still.
Route B: lobby mirror / elevator door.
Failure: reflection mouths private phrase; next social roll under observation TN 15.

CLUE 3 — Floor 13 after lie under observation.
Route A: manager denial + elevator camera test.
Route B: future comment thread in security office.
Failure: opens Tick 3 not 4; only two core clues; one exit locked; first Floor 13 action TN 15.

CLUE 4 — Apartment 13F collects performed selves.
Route A: Floor 13 hallway doors.
Route B: Mara's stream archive in Saffi's apartment.
Failure: easier self behind a door; accepting ticks Clock.

CLUE 5 — Mara reached by honest speech while recorded.
Route A: Saffi's memory.
Route B: live comment prompt.
Failure: audience asks first; answerer loses 1 Stability unless shielded.
handlerNotes.consequenceQueue:
FAILURE — Mara treated as content: off-camera rescue has Disadvantage; Mara stops responding off-camera.

FAILURE — Constant lies under observation: Floor 13 opens Tick 3; two clues only; TN 15 first action; one exit locked.

FAILURE — Fed comment thread for spectacle: Tick 5 begins on Floor 13 arrival; one Operator starts with Disadvantage on non-performance rolls.
handlerNotes.residueLog:
CLOCK 1 Camera Notices — tracks quietest Operator; Disadvantage unless shielded.
CLOCK 2 Comment Predicts — thread names next choice; mask learned if prediction hits.
CLOCK 3 Elevator Listens — TN 15 elevator action unless honest speech while recorded.
CLOCK 4 Floor 13 Opens — worse positioning if fewer than three clues.
CLOCK 5 Audience Edits — performed self grants Advantage once, Disadvantage until refused.
CLOCK 6 Performed Self Stabilizes — group must refuse role or lose Mara/Operator to easier version.

FIRST 20 MIN: Lobby camera before exposition. Camera answers first lie or honest admission. Stabilizer before escalate: step outside, name one normal thing, correct the lie.

Relationship.exit_condition: A private truth is spoken while watched, without making it content.

Evidence.broken_law: The useful proof becomes more real than the true proof.
Evidence.operator_choice: Preserve the ugly evidence, duplicate it, or let the feed curate it.
Evidence.exit_condition: Secure a clue before the feed edits it.

Time.operator_choice: Act before the caption resolves, wait for the audience, or break sequence.
Time.exit_condition: Interrupt the predicted action with a protected honest choice.

Signal.broken_law: The feed becomes the room's nervous system.

Signal.exit_condition: Broadcast route is severed, redirected toward the room, or made private.

Room.broken_law: The site accepts the performance as architecture.

Room.exit_condition: The group exits together after naming what the room is preserving.

rewrite_staging.counteraction_window: A witness says the original name and accepts being seen.

Name.rewrite_law: The accepted name becomes easier to remember than the original.
Name.lock_in_risk: If no one contradicts it before the next pressure beat, update the affected record.
Name.counteraction_window: A witness says the original name and accepts being seen.

Role.rewrite_law: The useful role becomes the stable identity.
Role.lock_in_risk: The character gains advantage while performing it, but loses access to unsupported selfhood.
Role.counteraction_window: Someone asks for the person, not the performance.

Memory.rewrite_law: The repeated version overwrites the witnessed version.
Memory.lock_in_risk: Future clues point to the edited event unless duplicated proof exists.
Memory.counteraction_window: Three independent records or witnesses reconstruct the true event.

Relationship.lock_in_risk: The audience can speak through the relationship.
Relationship.counteraction_window: The bond-holder names a private truth the audience cannot use.

Record.rewrite_law: The institutional version becomes enforceable reality.
Record.lock_in_risk: Police, landlord, platform, or file systems begin agreeing with the lie.
Record.counteraction_window: Duplicate, reconcile, or publicly contradict the record with cost.

Body.rewrite_law: The body adapts to the version most safely witnessed.
Body.lock_in_risk: The physical tell persists after exit.
Body.counteraction_window: Grounding, touch, medical proof, or self-naming interrupts the shift.

Location.rewrite_law: The accepted place becomes the reachable place.
Location.lock_in_risk: Floor 13 becomes easier to find than Floor 12.
Location.counteraction_window: Mark a mundane route and leave by verified architecture.

History.rewrite_law: The backstory becomes cleaner than the truth.
History.counteraction_window: Someone preserves the messy version without improving it.

player_view.safe_consequence: The room responds visibly when watched choices become honest, hidden, or performed.
